stories.title: Sources: No rush as Kerr, Warriors talks continue
stories.summary: Longtime Warriors head coach Steve Kerr met with team owner Joe Lacob and GM Mike Dunleavy on Monday, league sources told ESPN, with plans to reconvene next week over Kerr's future with the team.

stories.title: Simmons retires as Bronco: 'My heart, my home'
stories.summary: Two-time Pro Bowl safety Justin Simmons announced Wednesday that he is retiring from the NFL as a member of the Broncos.

stories.title: Arteta 'fuming' after Arsenal penalty overturned
stories.summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta was left "incredibly fuming" by a controversial penalty decision in their Champions League semifinal with Atlético Madrid.

stories.title: Yanks' Dominguez hurt; Cole progresses in rehab
stories.summary: Yankees outfielder Jasson Dominguez will have further testing on his left elbow when the team returns to New York after he was hit by a pitch Wednesday.

stories.title: Dybantsa ups NIL deal to pro Nike partnership
stories.summary: As AJ Dybantsa is transitioning from college to prepare for the NBA draft, he is also taking the next step in his endorsement deal with Nike. Dybantsa, who signed a NIL deal with Nike in 2024, is extending that agreement as pro basketball contract.
